meta.title: Pre-procedure medication question
meta.description: Caller asks about ibuprofen before root canal — route to clinical team, not treatment scheduling.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Cascade Family Dentistry, this is Aly.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: My name is Jack Ford. Can I take ibuprofen before my root canal tomorrow?

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: That's a great question for our clinical team. Phone number?
